passage:
One basic weakness in a conservation system based wholly on economic motives is that most members of the land community have no economic value. Yet these creatures are members of the biotic community and, if its  stability depends on  its integrity, they are entitled to continuance.

When one of these noneconomic categories is threatened and, if we happen to love it, we invent excuses to give it economic importance. At the beginning of the century songbirds were supposed to be disappearing. (46) Scientists jumped to the rescue with some distinctly shaky evidence to the effect that insects would eat us up if birds failed to control them. The evidence had to be economic in order to be valid.

It is painful to read these roundabout accounts today. We have no land ethic yet, but we have at least drawn nearer the point of admitting that birds should continue as a matter of intrinsic right, regardless of the presence or absence of economic advantage to us.

A parallel situation exists in respect of predatory mammals and fish-eating birds. Time was when biologists somewhat overworked the evidence that these creatures preserve the health of game by killing the physically weak, or that they prey only on “worthless” species. Here again, the evidence had to be economic in order to be valid. It is only in recent years that we hear the more honest argument that predators are members of the community, and that no special interest has the right to exterminate them for the sake of benefit, real or fancied, to itself.

Some species of trees have been “read out of the party” by economics-minded foresters because they grow too slowly, or have too low a sale value to pay as timber crops. (49) In Europe, where forestry is ecologically more advanced, the noncommercial tree species are recognized as members of the native forest community, to be preserved as such, within reason. Moreover, some have been found to have a valuable function in building up soil fertility. The interdependence of the forest and its constituent tree species, ground flora, and fauna is taken for granted.

To sum up: a system of conservation based solely on economic self-interest is hopelessly lopsided. (50) It tends to ignore, and thus eventually to eliminate, many elements in the land community that lack commercial value, but that are essential to its healthy functioning. It assumes, falsely, that the economic parts of the biotic clock will function without the uneconomic parts.
content: Scientists jumped to the rescue with some distinctly shaky evidence to the effect that insects would eat us up if birds failed to control them.
analysis: 本句的主干结构是Scientists jumped to the rescue with some evidence to the effect that…。其中with短语作状语，修饰jumped to the rescue，evidence后面接一个同位语从句to the effect that...，进一步说明证据的内容。evidence前有两个修饰词：distinctly 和 shaky，都表达了证据不足的含义。翻译时注意“to the effect that”的翻译，可译为“大意是，意思是”。

content: But we have at least drawn nearer the point of admitting that birds should continue as a matter of intrinsic right, regardless of the presence or absence of economic advantage to us.
analysis: 本句的主干结构是：But we have at least drawn nearer the point of admitting that…。draw nearer to the point of doing sth意为“越来越接近做…的程度”。Admitting后面接一个that引导的宾语从句。as a matter of intrinsic right 意为“作为一种内在的权利”，作状语，修饰continue。regardless of短语引导让步状语，进一步说明鸟类生存的权利。

content: Time was when biologists somewhat overworked the evidence that these creatures preserve the health of game by killing the physically weak, or that they prey only on “worthless” species.
analysis: 本句的结构较为复杂。Time was when...是定语从句的常见结构，修饰time。that these creatures preserve the health of game by killing the physically weak, or that they prey only on "worthless" species. 是the evidence的同位语从句。 somewhat overworked 意为 “或多或少滥用”。翻译时需要对语序进行调整。

passage:

Here again, the evidence had to be economic in order to be valid. It is only in recent years that we hear the more honest argument that predators are members of the community, and that no special interest has the right to exterminate them for the sake of benefit, real or fancied, to itself.

content: In Europe, where forestry is ecologically more advanced, the noncommercial tree species are recognized as members of the native forest community, to be preserved as such, within reason.
analysis: 本句是一个主系表结构，其中where forestry is ecologically more advanced是一个非限制性定语从句，修饰Europe。to be preserved as such是不定式作目的状语，表示“为了被保护”。within reason作状语，表示“在合理的范围内”。翻译时，注意语序的调整，先翻译地点状语，再翻译主干，最后翻译目的状语。

content: It tends to ignore, and thus eventually to eliminate, many elements in the land community that lack commercial value, but that are essential to its healthy functioning.
analysis: 本句的主干结构是：It tends to ignore, and thus eventually to eliminate many elements...。其中that lack commercial value, but that are essential to its healthy functioning是两个并列的定语从句，修饰many elements。tends to ignore and eliminate是并列的谓语。翻译时，需要将两个定语从句放在被修饰词之前，并注意因果关系的表达，用“导致”一词。
